recipe.title: Whole roasted cauliflower
recipe.description: Jamie's whole roasted cauliflower recipe is a great vegan Christmas dinner idea. Spiced with thyme and paprika, this roast cauliflower will go down a treat!

ingredients.name: ½ a bunch of fresh thyme
½ a bunch of fresh flat-leaf parsley

steps.descr: Peel the garlic, then add to a pestle and mortar with...
steps.instructions: Peel the garlic, then add to a pestle and mortar with the paprika and half the thyme leaves. Bash well to a rough paste, then muddle in 2 tablespoons of olive oil and season.

on_enter.say: Peel the garlic, then add to a pestle and mortar with the paprika and half the thyme leaves. Bash well to a rough paste, then muddle in 2 tablespoons of olive oil and season.

steps.descr: Zest the lemon into a separate bowl and set aside
steps.instructions: Zest the lemon into a separate bowl and set aside.

on_enter.say: Zest the lemon into a separate bowl and set aside.

steps.instructions: Trim the outer cauliflower leaves. Trim away and discard the stalk so the cauliflower can sit flat, then cut a cross into the base.

on_enter.say: Trim the outer cauliflower leaves. Trim away and discard the stalk so the cauliflower can sit flat, then cut a cross into the base.

steps.descr: Rub the paprika paste all over the cauliflower, then...
steps.instructions: Rub the paprika paste all over the cauliflower, then place in a medium casserole pan. Drizzle over the sherry and squeeze the lemon juice on top.

on_enter.say: Rub the paprika paste all over the cauliflower, then place in a medium casserole pan. Drizzle over the sherry and squeeze the lemon juice on top.

steps.descr: Cover and pop in the hot oven for around 1 hour 20...
steps.instructions: Cover and pop in the hot oven for around 1 hour 20 minutes, or until tender, removing the lid for the final 20 minutes.

on_enter.say: Cover and pop in the hot oven for around 1 hour 20 minutes, or until tender, removing the lid for the final 20 minutes.

steps.descr: Remove the pan from the oven, then pour in the tomatoes,...
steps.instructions: Remove the pan from the oven, then pour in the tomatoes, tearing or slicing them up into chunks. Sprinkle over the lemon zest and pick over the remaining thyme leaves.

on_enter.say: Remove the pan from the oven, then pour in the tomatoes, tearing or slicing them up into chunks. Sprinkle over the lemon zest and pick over the remaining thyme leaves.

steps.descr: Return the pan to the oven for a further 10 minutes, or...
steps.instructions: Return the pan to the oven for a further 10 minutes, or until the cauliflower is golden.

on_enter.say: Return the pan to the oven for a further 10 minutes, or until the cauliflower is golden.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, toast the almonds in a dry frying pan over a...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, toast the almonds in a dry frying pan over a medium-low heat until golden, then leave to cool.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, toast the almonds in a dry frying pan over a medium-low heat until golden, then leave to cool.

steps.descr: Once ready, take the pan out of the oven
steps.instructions: Once ready, take the pan out of the oven. Scrunch over the toasted almonds, then pick, roughly chop and scatter the parsley leaves on top.

on_enter.say: Once ready, take the pan out of the oven. Scrunch over the toasted almonds, then pick, roughly chop and scatter the parsley leaves on top.

steps.descr: Drizzle with extra virgin olive oil, then carve up and...
steps.instructions: Drizzle with extra virgin olive oil, then carve up and serve with pilaf rice and steamed greens, or as part of a bigger spread.

on_enter.say: Drizzle with extra virgin olive oil, then carve up and serve with pilaf rice and steamed greens, or as part of a bigger spread.
